generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor for precise feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder positioned behind the gearbox to reduce backlash and positional uncertainty"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time series sensor data streamed via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance PositionSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated and abstracted sensor data traces for monitoring and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, CPlusPlus, Java
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Drives the gear transmission with cycloidal gear mechanism for precise motion control"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller accepting position, speed, or acceleration inputs to manage actuation"
]

instance MABIMAX100PhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical serial robot MABI MAX 100 system for precision manufacturing tasks"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, SiemensSINUMERIK840DController, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance RFLP : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MBSE methodology defining Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics model types"
]

instance OOSEM : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Object-Oriented Systems Engineering Methodology for hierarchical system abstraction"
]

instance SPES : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System Product Engineering System for hierarchical system abstraction"
]

instance SMArDT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Smart Digital Twin methodology for system abstraction"
]

instance ACME : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language for modeling components, interfaces, and interconnections"
]

instance AADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language for modeling components, interfaces, and interconnections"
]

instance MontiArcADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language for modeling components, interfaces, and interconnections"
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagrams for structural modeling"
]

instance MontiArcAutomaton : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Behavior modeling using MontiArc Automaton"
]

instance SysMLStateMachine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Behavior modeling using SysML state machines"
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation tool for dynamic system modeling"
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "General-purpose programming language for simulation code"
]

instance Java : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "General-purpose programming language for simulation code"
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural modeling using Internal Block Diagrams for requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLIBD
]

instance PhysicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based analytical model defined by RFLP methodology"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RFLP
]

instance SysMLStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral modeling via SysML state machines"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStateMachine
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral modeling using MontiArc Automaton"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomaton
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model using MathWorks Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance CPlusPlusModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "General-purpose code model implemented in C++"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus
]

instance JavaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "General-purpose code model implemented in Java"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Java

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Time-series sensor data is streamed via MQTT protocol, and live measurements are integrated with structural and behavioral models for operational data."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture integrates SysML for structural modeling, Simulink for dynamic simulations, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized data exchange, following the Digital Shadow Reference Model to coordinate components and manage resources across the Digital Twin ecosystem."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol used for streaming time series sensor data from physical sensors to the digital system."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Sensor data is streamed via MQTT protocol, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) are implemented for standardized asset representation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML, AADL, ACME, and MontiArc for architecture description. MBSE methodologies integrate these languages across multiple abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer), ensuring interoperability among heterogeneous stakeholders and tools such as Simulink, C++, and Java."
]
